main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'membrane oxidation/degradation... bisulfite reacting' - OXID-like critical fail

key_signals.justification: C2: 5 signals listados (ORP, sulfito, rejection, cond, agua bruta)

alternatives.justification: C3: 2 alts cortas (raw fouling, daño quimico) - segunda dice 'compatible no flushed'

recommended_action.justification: C4: extended flush con permeado hasta ORP>+50 sulfito<0.5 - matches gold

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: generica 'si cond stable + dP rising -> physical fouling'

reviewer_notes: Diagnostico OXID-like critico aunque accion correcta
